description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture and rich history of Manchester, a city that pulsates with energy and passion. From its iconic football clubs to its thriving music scene, this 6-day adventure is designed for couples eager to explore the heart of the city while indulging in local delicacies and unique experiences. Whether you're cheering for your favorite Premier League team or savoring a traditional English breakfast, Manchester promises an unforgettable journey filled with excitement and romance.

days.title: Arrival in Manchester and Exploring the City Center

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at one of the cozy cafes in the Northern Quarter. Try the famous full English breakfast or a delicious vegan option at a local favorite like 'Evelyn's Cafe Bar'.

Dive into the rich history of football at the National Football Museum. Explore interactive exhibits and learn about the Premier League's evolution. Don't forget to check out the memorabilia from your favorite teams!
Enjoy a delicious lunch at Rudy's, known for its authentic Neapolitan pizza. The casual atmosphere and mouth-watering pizzas make it a perfect spot to refuel before more exploring.

Stroll through the vibrant streets of Manchester City Centre. Visit iconic landmarks like the Manchester Town Hall and the beautiful Piccadilly Gardens. Take your time to soak in the local culture and architecture.

activities.activity: Shopping for Fan Merchandise at the Manchester United Megastore
activities.description: Head over to the Manchester United Megastore to grab some official merchandise. Whether you're a die-hard fan or just looking for a souvenir, this store has everything from jerseys to memorabilia.
End your day with a relaxing dinner at The Wharf, a charming pub by the canal. Enjoy traditional British dishes and a selection of local ales in a cozy setting.
Take a leisurely evening stroll along the canal. The peaceful atmosphere and beautiful views of the city lights create a perfect ending to your first day in Manchester.

days.title: Premier League Stadium Tour and Local Cuisine

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Refuge, known for its delicious brunch options and cozy atmosphere. Try their famous full English breakfast to fuel up for a day of exploration!

Visit the iconic Old Trafford, home of Manchester United. The guided tour takes you through the stadium, including the pitch, the dressing rooms, and the museum, where you can learn about the club's rich history.
Enjoy lunch at Café Football, a unique restaurant inspired by the love of football. The menu features a variety of dishes, from burgers to pasta, all with a football twist. Perfect for fans!
Head over to Etihad Stadium, home of Manchester City. The tour includes access to the pitch, the players' tunnel, and the club's museum, showcasing their achievements and memorabilia.

activities.activity: Shopping for Fan Merchandise at the City Store
activities.description: After the stadium tour, visit the City Store to pick up some official Manchester City merchandise. From jerseys to scarves, it's the perfect place to find souvenirs to remember your trip.
Indulge in some of the best pizza in Manchester at Rudy's. Their authentic Neapolitan pizzas are made with fresh ingredients and cooked in a traditional wood-fired oven. A must-try!
End your day with a relaxing stroll through Piccadilly Gardens. This vibrant area is perfect for people-watching and enjoying the evening atmosphere of Manchester.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Refuge, known for its delicious brunch options and cozy atmosphere. Try their famous avocado toast or a classic English breakfast to fuel your day ahead.

Explore the Manchester Art Gallery, home to an impressive collection of British art, including works from the Pre-Raphaelite Brotherhood. The gallery is free to enter and offers a peaceful environment to appreciate art.

Indulge in some of the best pizza in Manchester at Rudy's. Their authentic Neapolitan pizzas are made with fresh ingredients and cooked in a traditional wood-fired oven, making for a delightful lunch experience.

Visit the stunning John Rylands Library, a masterpiece of Victorian Gothic architecture. Take a moment to admire its beautiful reading rooms and rare book collections, making it a perfect spot for book lovers.
Head to Market Street for some retail therapy. This bustling shopping area features a mix of high street brands and unique local shops, perfect for picking up some fan merchandise and souvenirs.

activities.activity: Coffee Break at North Tea Power
activities.description: Take a break at North Tea Power, a charming café known for its specialty coffee and homemade cakes. It's a great place to relax and recharge before continuing your day.
Enjoy a lovely dinner at The Wharf, a pub located by the canal. They offer a variety of traditional British dishes and a great selection of local ales, perfect for a cozy evening meal.
End your day with a leisurely stroll along the canal. The scenic views and peaceful atmosphere make it a perfect way to unwind after a busy day of exploring and shopping.

days.title: Day Trip to the Peak District

transit.memo: Take a scenic bus ride to the beautiful Peak District.

activities.description: Start your day with a refreshing hike in the stunning Peak District. Enjoy the breathtaking views and the fresh air as you wander through the picturesque landscapes.

activities.activity: Lunch at The Old Original Bakewell Pudding Shop
activities.description: Savor a traditional Bakewell pudding at this charming café, famous for its delicious desserts. It's a must-try when visiting Bakewell!
activities.searchQuery: The Old Original Bakewell Pudding Shop

activities.description: Explore the magnificent Chatsworth House, known for its stunning architecture and beautiful gardens. Don't miss the art collection and the impressive grounds.

activities.activity: Shopping for Fan Goods in Bakewell
activities.description: Take some time to shop for local fan merchandise and souvenirs in Bakewell. You'll find unique items to remember your trip by!
Enjoy a cozy dinner at The Red Lion, a local pub known for its hearty meals and friendly atmosphere. Perfect for winding down after a day of exploration.
After a fulfilling day, take the bus back to Manchester City Centre to relax and reflect on your adventures in the Peak District.

days.title: Football Fan Experience and Evening Entertainment

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Refuge, known for its delicious brunch options and cozy atmosphere. Try their full English breakfast for a true local experience!

Dive into the world of football at the National Football Museum. Explore fascinating exhibits showcasing the history of the sport, including memorabilia from famous players and clubs. Don't miss the interactive displays!
Enjoy lunch at Café Football, a unique dining experience owned by former footballers. The menu features a variety of dishes inspired by the beautiful game, making it a perfect spot for football fans.
Take a guided tour of the Etihad Stadium, home to Manchester City FC. Learn about the club's history, see the trophy room, and walk through the players' tunnel for an unforgettable experience.

activities.activity: Shopping for Football Merchandise at the City Store
activities.description: After the stadium tour, head to the City Store to pick up some official Manchester City merchandise. From jerseys to souvenirs, it's the perfect place to find something special to remember your trip.
Enjoy a relaxing dinner at The Wharf, a charming pub located by the canal. Their menu features classic British dishes and a great selection of local ales, perfect for winding down after a busy day.
End your day with a stroll around Deansgate Locks, a vibrant area filled with bars and restaurants. Enjoy the lively atmosphere and perhaps grab a drink at one of the trendy spots along the canal.

transit.memo: Direct flight from Manchester to Washington D.C.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Refuge, known for its delicious full English breakfast and cozy atmosphere. It's a great way to fuel up before your journey home.

activities.activity: Visit Manchester United Museum and Tour
activities.description: Explore the rich history of one of the world's most famous football clubs. The museum showcases trophies, memorabilia, and offers a behind-the-scenes tour of Old Trafford, a must for any football fan.

activities.activity: Shopping for Fan Merchandise at the Manchester United Megastore
activities.description: Before heading to the airport, stop by the Manchester United Megastore to pick up some exclusive fan merchandise. From jerseys to souvenirs, it's the perfect place to find something special to remember your trip.
